scripts.check: biome check scripts/monorepo package.json turbo.json biome.json knip.jsonc .dependency-cruiser.cjs && node scripts/monorepo/check-deploy-runbooks.mjs && turbo run check && pnpm run depcruise && pnpm run knip
scripts.verify: sh scripts/monorepo/run-with-artifacts.sh sh -c 'pnpm run verify:monorepo && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && pnpm run secret-scan && pnpm run check && pnpm run test:scripts && turbo run type-check && turbo run test && turbo run test:types && pnpm run smoke && pnpm run bench'
scripts.test-ci: sh scripts/monorepo/run-with-artifacts.sh sh -c 'pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && pnpm run secret-scan && pnpm run check && turbo run type-check && turbo run test && turbo run test:types && pnpm run test:scripts && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run smoke && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run bench && pnpm run verify:monorepo'
scripts.release-check: sh scripts/monorepo/run-with-artifacts.sh sh -c 'pnpm audit --prod --audit-level=high && pnpm run secret-scan && pnpm run build && pnpm run check:packages && pnpm run validate:artifacts:check && pnpm run check && pnpm run test:scripts && turbo run type-check && turbo run test && turbo run test:types && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run smoke && DIFFGAZER_SMOKE_STRICT_SKIPS=1 pnpm run bench && pnpm run registry:live-check && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/add pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/ui pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/keys pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter diffgazer pack --dry-run && pnpm run verify:monorepo && git diff --check'
scripts.prepare:library-artifacts: pnpm --filter @diffgazer/core generate:catalog-snapshot && biome format --write libs/core/src/catalog/catalog-snapshot.ts libs/core/src/catalog/provider-derived.ts && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/registry build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/keys build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/ui build && pnpm --filter @diffgazer/add generate:bundles && node --import tsx cli/add/scripts/copy-generated.ts
scripts.prepare:artifacts: pnpm run prepare:library-artifacts && DIFFGAZER_SKIP_ARTIFACT_PREPARE=1 pnpm --filter @diffgazer/docs prepare:generated
scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter diffgazer build && pnpm run smoke:cli && pnpm run smoke:packages && pnpm run smoke:shadcn && pnpm run smoke:modelsdev
scripts.bench: turbo run build --filter=@diffgazer/server && node --import tsx scripts/monorepo/benchmark-server.mjs
